steps.name: codex-hooks-and-doc-foundation
steps.summary: Codex hooks, CLAUDE contract, and redesign docs were aligned to the warehouse-ops, sourcing, and store-connections IA.

steps.name: navigation-and-route-simplification
steps.summary: Navigation was simplified to direct primary items plus a sourcing group, with protected routes aligned around /inventory and /integrations.

steps.name: inventory-operations-hub
steps.summary: Converted /inventory into a warehouse-scoped operations hub with overview, quick entry overlays, CSV import workspace, embedded history, and supporting regression coverage.

steps.name: sourcing-schema-and-arrivals
steps.summary: Added staging factories and factory arrivals schema, sourcing CRUD and CSV/manual arrival registration, and regression coverage without changing inventory ledger behavior.

steps.name: receive-to-warehouse-and-history
steps.summary: Added one-click factory-arrival receive-to-warehouse flow with partial receipt support and source metadata in history; tests passed, build blocked by external Geist font fetch.

steps.name: store-connections-and-shipping-upgrade
steps.summary: Reworked store connections to surface Naver and Coupang credential state with masked values and last-updated timestamps while preserving the existing shipping provider flow.

steps.name: settings-consolidation-and-regression
steps.summary: Consolidated master-data style admin surfaces under settings and verified analytics/shipping routes and the overall phase contract with passing test, build, and harness validation runs.
